archetype: Pastel & Soft mixed with Organic & Earthy

typography.notes: Do not use Inter for headings. Keep headings tight and body relaxed.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. p-8, p-12, p-16 for marketing sections. Tighter grids for the dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid (Mode B) - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for marketing containers, rounded-xl for dashboard cards.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Containers with borders MUST have padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF8552] text-white hover:bg-[#E57545] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#CBF3D2] text-[#0E0E52] hover:bg-[#B5E3BE] transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-[#0E0E52] text-[#0E0E52] hover:bg-[#0E0E52] hover:text-white transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium

cards.marketing: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(14,14,82,0.05)] border border-[#0E0E52]/5
cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl p-6 border border-[#0E0E52]/10 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg transition-all

components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-[#0E0E52]/10 sticky top-0 z-50
components.navigation: Use Lucide React for icons. Always visible on desktop. Mobile uses hamburger menu.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists and grid items (use framer-motion).

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons (already installed). Phosphor or Heroicons if specific stylistic needs arise, but Lucide is preferred.

hero.description: Woman on pilates reformer - use for main landing page hero

studios_and_classes.description: Pilates reformer class - use for class thumbnails
Floor pilates - use for class or studio gallery
Bright studio interior - use for studio profile header

instructors.description: Smiling female instructor - use for studio instructor profile

screens.name: Landing Page
sections: Hero (Asymmetric split, large typography, CTA, hero image)
Featured Studios (Bento grid or horizontal scroll of studio cards)
Footer (Dark background #0E0E52, white text, generous padding)

screens.name: Explore Classes
sections: Class Grid (Dense cards showing class time, title, instructor, credit cost)

screens.name: Studio Profile
sections: Content Split (Left: Vibe, Amenities, Gallery, Instructors. Right: Sticky Class Schedule / Booking Panel)

screens.name: User Dashboard
sections: Sidebar or Top Navigation specific to user
Credit Balance Widget (Highlight in Coral Glow #FF8552)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure #0E0E52 text on #CBF3D2 and #FFFFFF backgrounds meets APCA standards. White text on #FF8552 must be checked; if fails, use dark text or bolder font weight.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='book-class-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers, Shadcn components for complex interactive pieces (Dropdown, Dialog, Calendar).
Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body from Google Fonts.
Build the 4 screens as standard React components or pages.
DO NOT use placeholder image URLs like via.placeholder.com. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the image_urls section.
Apply data-testid to all actionable items.
Ensure generous padding on marketing sections and tight, structured layout on the dashboard.
